description: Identify land parcels from '/home/ga/GIS_Data/cadastral/subdivision_parcels.geojson' that are isolated from the road network provided in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/cadastral/road_network.geojson'. Create a 10-meter easement buffer around only those parcels that do not share a boundary with any road. Ensure accurate metric buffering by using the 'WGS 84 / UTM zone 10N' (EPSG:32610) projection. Save the final buffered result to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/easement_buffers.geojson'.
